testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Board: Page Structure loads board page
OpenSparrow – Board: Page Structure shows a board title
OpenSparrow – Board: Page Structure renders lanes or a configuration notice
testcase.classname: renders lanes or a configuration notice

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Board: Page Structure shows sidebar menu
OpenSparrow – Board: Lanes & Cards each lane has a header with a title and a count badge
testcase.classname: each lane has a header with a title and a count badge

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Board: Lanes & Cards cards are draggable for the editor role
testcase.classname: cards are draggable for the editor role

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Board: Lanes & Cards a card has a colored left border accent
testcase.classname: a card has a colored left border accent

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Board: Lanes & Cards clicking a card opens the record in edit.php
testcase.classname: clicking a card opens the record in edit.php

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Board: Mobile loads board on mobile viewport
OpenSparrow – Board: Mobile board title visible on mobile
OpenSparrow – Board: API contract returns the expected board payload shape
testcase.classname: returns the expected board payload shape

testcase.name: OpenSparrow – Board: API contract rejects a move_card request with a missing CSRF token
testcase.classname: rejects a move_card request with a missing CSRF token
